_comment: Maps THE SHIBOSHIS on-chain metadata (contract 0x11450058d796b02eb53e65374be59cff65d3fe7f, Ethereum) to the Shiba Eternity 3D kit. Rule: normalize value = lowercase, strip spaces + apostrophes. That resolves most trait values directly to a mesh/texture key. Overrides + routing below handle the exceptions.

Clothes._note: normalize(value) -> clothes/<n>.obj (business suit->businesssuit, no fud->nofud, orange gi->orangegi, tux shirt->tuxshirt, blue armor->bluearmor, peace tank->peacetank, rocker vest->rockervest, wizard robe->wizardrobe)

Mouth._note: mouth mesh names use underscores in our staged kit; adjust if renamed

Eyes._note: Eyes is one metadata slot but our kit splits it 3 ways.

texture._note: eye DIF texture on the base Eyes material

expression._note: animation/blendshape-driven; no mesh or texture. Use the matching *_CLP clip once animation is wired; fall back to Classic texture in static mode.

Background._note: 13 flat backdrops (beach, blue, space, pyramids, rainbow, ...). Not a 3D mesh — the game should render as a backdrop layer, ignored by the character compositor.
